CheckTitle: Ensure app registrations have an assigned owner
Description: Identifies app registrations that have no owner assigned. Ownerless apps cannot be managed through self-service and credential rotation responsibility is unclear.
Risk: Without an assigned owner, there is no accountable party for credential rotation, permission reviews, or incident response. Ownerless apps often become orphaned with stale credentials and excessive permissions.

Remediation.Recommendation: Assign at least one owner to each app registration. Use Entra ID access reviews to periodically verify app ownership. Remove or disable truly orphaned applications.
